title: Cabbages & Kings | Do Demonstrations Really Set Off Change? Look At History: Iran, Vietnam, Immigrants | Farrukh Dhondy
description: I can and will claim to be a veteran of the shouty march, from my teenage foray into the demonstrating columns in my college days in Mumbai shouting “hamara naam, tumara naam, Vietnam, Vietnam”, to London demos in the same cause chanting “Ho, Ho, Ho Chi Minh!” and dodging mounted police outside the American embassy at Grosvenor Square
